title: ResidenceEnhance
body:
![Core Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Core%20Support-Spigot|Folia-blue)
![Version Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version%20Support-1.7.x--26.x-blue)
![Paid](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paid-No-blue)
![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fricedoc.handyplus.cn%2Fversion.json&query=%24.ResidenceEnhance&prefix=v&label=Latest%20Version)

### 1. Introduction

> ResidenceEnhance —— A companion plugin for Residence

### 2. Features

1. Simple configuration to block commands in residence areas

```yaml
# Whether to also restrict OPs (true=restrict, false=allow)
isOp: true

# Whether to also restrict residence owners
isOwner: false

msg: "§aThis command is prohibited in this residence!"

# Restricted residence names (* means all residences)
name:
  - "test"
  - "fly"

# Commands prohibited in residences (case insensitive)
command:
  - "setHome"
  - "fly"
```

### 3. Prerequisites

Residence Plugin (Required)  
[SpigotMc](https://www.123684.com/s/9DpPjv-ScVgh)

### 4. Documentation

[Click to View](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/wiki/ResidenceEnhance)
